meta.title: Devanshu Singhvi | Portfolio
meta.description: Devanshu Singhvi - student and developer. Computer science, systems, and security.

hero.name: Devanshu Singhvi
hero.tagline: Student & developer - systems, security and real-world problems.

about.title: Origin story
paragraphs: I'm Devanshu Singhvi - a student and developer with an Honours B.Sc. in Computer Science and Mathematical Sciences from the University of Toronto. I care about systems, security, and problems that matter in the real world.
I've interned in IT Security at the Bank of Bahrain and Kuwait and in I&IT Transit at Metrolinx. I've been a teaching assistant for CSC347 (Information Security) and CSC427 (Computer Security).
I'm currently pursuing an MScAC (Master of Science in Applied Computing) at the University of Toronto.

work.title: Software Engineer (Full-Stack)
paragraphs: » Built and shipped an MVP Procore-integrated automation platform using async Django/ADRF APIs and OAuth2.
» Improved reliability with correlation-ID tracing, structured logging, Redis caching, and OpenAPI documentation.
» Dockerized services with GitHub Actions CI/CD to Cloud Run and deployed the React frontend to Firebase Hosting.

CSC209 - Software Tools and Systems Programming

paragraphs: CSC207 - Software Design
CSC309 - Programming on the Web
CSC347 - Introduction to Information Security
CSC369 - Operating Systems

work.title: Teaching Assistant - CSC347
work.subtitle: Introduction to Information Security
paragraphs: » Conducted weekly tutorials and practical sessions for 80+ undergraduates on software security, systems security, network security, and cryptography.
» Graded and provided detailed feedback for 200+ students, keeping pace with course schedules.

work.title: IT Security Intern
work.location: Bank of Bahrain and Kuwait, Bahrain
paragraphs: » Used Trend Micro Vision One to identify and assess vulnerable assets and prioritize remediation.
» Deployed packages with Lansweeper to automate configuration changes, mitigate 1500+ security risks, and update software across 4000+ assets.
» Hardened Ubuntu 22 servers toward STIG compliance; updated GPOs and firewall rules for network security.

work.title: I&IT Transit Summer Student
paragraphs: » Built Grafana and Prometheus dashboards for real-time GO Train and Bus insights from transit telemetry.
» Added custom IoT metrics to C# and Node.js services; monitoring for multiple apps and APIs.
» Created alerts that cut MTTD by over 75%; contributed to RTI enhancements including Schedule Manager and HTTPS updates.

honours.title: UofT Dean's List Scholar
paragraphs: For UTM degree students with CGPA ≥ 3.50 at the end of the session when the 5th, 10th, 15th, or 20th credit is passed.

honours.title: UofT Renewable Entrance Scholarship
paragraphs: $3,000/year for 95%+ high school average and maintaining 3.7+ CGPA in university.

honours.title: UofT Scholars Award
paragraphs: Recognition for outstanding students at admission; ~900 domestic and international students considered automatically from admission average.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Want to collaborate or chat about systems and security? Reach out - I'm always up for a good technical fight scene.
